textByHashes.ea561b4e958b3b1f16c13c79ea5c5148e07c4399: If I were as ugly as you I would not dare to show my face in public!
textByHashes.e8348363606c6da10d7c5d39784ccedbdbe83490: Don't talk to me again if you value your life!
textByHashes.20c6ef64c877f81532224793e4a21f7d25390e4e: I don't have anything to give you so leave me alone, mendicant.
textByHashes.838410ad0341e9edc45538a3a3ac50a2976a6b23: I don't have time for this right now.
textByHashes.2856c2b433d448d96256a236ad159becac8237db: I have no interest in talking to a pathetic meat bag like yourself.
textByHashes.ff53debe68359c7147a991c39a64ff21fe74d521: I bet you have wonderful paws.
textByHashes.98fc3a4b96cfaf46d881f5bc072418667d65eaa4: A very miserable day, altogether... enjoy it while it lasts.
textByHashes.9bf36b43846bd905d66d17818ded1bee08b470ca: If you catch anyone promise me you'll share.
textByHashes.622f4999793e9caf3db93de039cff4349d1464ab: I haven't smelt you around here before...
textByHashes.da2f515fe23d04e5eb96185ef7ac2a090868d548: Seen any humans around here? I'm v-e-r-y hungry.
textByHashes.dcd07dea0a4c6664ed8e4caf225483041303df07: You look to me like someone with a healthy taste for blood.
textByHashes.ab1000e38162780854abfdb79f7d7416b83985d1: Good day to you, my friend.
textByHashes.7daefa190684489d5449dd17539f67e67fe98b88: Fancy going up to the castle for a bit of a snack?
textByHashes.14585b97e59fc77fc34ca64d22ec346b28fc39f1: Give me a moment, I have a bit of someone stuck in my teeth...
